name: io.github.Servosity/quickbooks-mcp
title: QuickBooks Online MCP
description: Every QuickBooks Online Accounting entity, plus an offline SQLite mirror and AR/AP aging.

environmentVariables.name: QUICKBOOKS_ACCESS_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: OAuth 2.0 bearer access token (scope com.intuit.quickbooks.accounting). Mint it from the Intuit OAuth 2.0 Playground or `quickbooks-cli auth refresh`.
